name: "💡 Feature request"
about: Suggest an idea or improvement that isn't a single catalog entry
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

<!-- What's painful today? What's missing? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would the ideal UX / behavior look like? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why this approach? -->

## Is this a catalog edit?

If your idea is "add this MCP / agent / scaffolder / bundle", please use the corresponding 🆕 issue template instead — those get the right structured fields and are usually mergeable in minutes.

## Anything else?

Links to upstream tools, prior art, screenshots, ascii mockups.
